title: Design System: My Life in Data

display.purpose: Hero on Home, source-page title (Spotify / YouTube / Maps / Calendar).

body.purpose: Prose, KPI explainer markdown, tooltips. Cap at 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Mono KPI captions, axis labels, channel identifiers. Slight letter-spacing.

numeric.purpose: Every KPI value and figure rendered from data. Tabular figures.

shadows.name: lift
shadows.purpose: Hover state on interactive surfaces (channel tiles, list rows). Subtle, downward, charcoal-tinted.

shadows.name: channel-glow-green
shadows.purpose: Hover or active state on the Spotify channel tile only.

shadows.name: channel-glow-red
shadows.purpose: Hover or active state on the YouTube channel tile only.

shadows.name: channel-glow-violet
shadows.purpose: Hover or active state on the Maps channel tile only.

shadows.name: channel-glow-blue
shadows.purpose: Hover or active state on the Calendar channel tile only.

motion.name: ease-out-snap
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, focus). Sharp, no bounce.

motion.name: duration-state
motion.purpose: State changes: tile lift, ring appearance, channel solo.

components.name: Channel Tile
components.description: Home page source card. A mixing-desk channel strip with LED indicator and fader.
components.html: SPOTIFY847ARTISTS
components.css: .ds-channel-tile { display: grid; grid-template-rows: auto auto auto auto; gap: 8px; padding: 20px; background: #1A1A1A; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 8px; text-decoration: none; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-channel-tile[data-channel="green"] .ds-channel-led { background: #1DB954; } .ds-channel-tile[data-channel="green"]:hover { box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.4), 0 0 32px rgba(29,185,84,0.3); border-color: rgba(29,185,84,0.4); } .ds-channel-tile[data-channel="green"] .ds-channel-fader-fill { background: #1DB954; } .ds-channel-led { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 1px; } .ds-channel-label { font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-channel-value { font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 2.25rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; font-feature-settings: 'tnum'; color: #FFFFFF; } .ds-channel-meta { font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 0.625rem; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-channel-fader { height: 3px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 1px; overflow: hidden; margin-top: 4px; } .ds-channel-fader-fill { display: block; height: 100%; width: 68%; }

components.name: KPI Meter
components.description: Per-source-page KPI tile with mono numeric and an optional fader bar.
components.css: .ds-kpi-meter { display: grid; gap: 6px; padding: 16px 20px; background: #1A1A1A; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 8px; font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace; } .ds-kpi-label { font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-kpi-value { font-size: 1.875rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; font-feature-settings: 'tnum'; color: #1DB954; } .ds-kpi-fader { height: 2px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); margin-top: 4px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-kpi-fader-fill { display: block; height: 100%; width: 72%; background: #1DB954; }

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #FFFFFF; color: #1A1A1A; font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 10px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.4); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4285F4; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Default for navigation and secondary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: #1A1A1A; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 10px 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); color: #FFFFFF; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FFFFFF; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Single-line text input. Mono input text.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="track name" aria-label="Search tracks" />
components.css: .ds-input { background: #1A1A1A; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 10px 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 4px; width: 100%; transition: border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #FFFFFF; outline: 2px solid #1DB954; outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview:
The dashboard is a control room for one person's digital life. Four channels — Spotify, YouTube, Maps, Calendar — feed signal into one master view. The aesthetic borrows from studio gear and modular synths: matte rack surfaces, mono-forward labels, LED-tinted accents, fader-strip layouts where each channel has its lane and its signature color.

Two reference frequencies share the band: Raycast sets the baseline tempo (dense, restrained, confident), and Spotify Wrapped at ~70% intensity owns the expressive moments. They alternate — never both at full volume at once.
keyCharacteristics: Producer-console aesthetic: rack surfaces, fader strips, LED-tinted channel colors, mono numerics
Calm bones (Raycast), expressive moments (Wrapped at 70%) — never both loud at once
Flat-by-default surfaces; lift only in response to state (hover, focus)
Voice in copy, not in chrome
Channel-color discipline: each source owns one accent, used as signal not decoration

rules.name: The Channel-Lane Rule
rules.body: A channel color owns its source page and only its source page. Channel Green never appears on the YouTube page; Channel Red never appears in a Spotify chart. Cross-source aggregate pages (Home, AI chat) may show all four together — that is the only context where they share a screen.

rules.name: The 10% Rule, Reframed
rules.body: Outside Wrapped-flavored moments, the channel color occupies ≤10% of any given screen. Inside a Wrapped moment — a hero, a live-now card, a soloed channel — it may occupy 30–60% of a contained area, never the whole viewport.

rules.name: The Trace-Not-Identity Rule
rules.body: Trends (up/down) use Trace Up / Trace Down, not the channel color. The channel color is the source's identity; the trace is the data's direction.

rules.name: The Mono-for-Data Rule
rules.body: Anything that is a number rendered from data — KPI values, timestamps, percentages, durations, axis ticks — is set in mono with tabular figures. Prose is sans.

rules.name: The 65ch Rule
rules.body: Body prose (the explainer pages especially) caps line length at 65–75ch.

rules.name: The Flat-Rest Rule
rules.body: Every surface is flat at rest. No drop shadows, no glass blur, no gradient borders. If the surface looks elevated when nothing is happening, it is over-designed.

rules.name: The Single-Lift Rule
rules.body: Only one element on a screen lifts at a time. Hover state is exclusive — when one tile lifts, the rest stay flat.

dos: Do treat every source as a channel: one color, one lane, one signature LED. Cross-channel mixing happens only on aggregate views (Home, the planned AI chat).
Do set all numerics in mono with tabular figures. Every KPI, every timestamp, every axis tick.
Do keep surfaces flat at rest. Lift, glow, and ring belong to response, not decoration.
Do earn Wrapped-flavored loud moments by surrounding them with restraint.
Do put personality in copy first: headlines, empty states, error messages, the no-track caption on the Live Track card.
Do install a real type pairing in Tailwind config: IBM Plex Sans + IBM Plex Mono (or Inter Tight + JetBrains Mono).
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion. Disable Typewriter, ParticleBackground, and entrance Framer Motion when set.
Do maintain 4.5:1 contrast on body text and 3:1 on labels — even inside Wrapped-flavored drenched moments.
donts: Don't use glassmorphism (backdrop-blur, bg-white/5 frosted panels) as a default surface.
Don't ship side-stripe borders (border-left: 3px solid {color}) as a row affordance.
Don't nest containers. A card inside a card is forbidden.
Don't repeat the hero-metric template across the top of every page.
Don't use purple-to-blue or any other AI-tool gradient.
Don't apply background-clip: text gradient text anywhere.
Don't let Wrapped energy spill into format. No story-mode-per-viewport, no full-bleed single-stat screens.
Don't style trend indicators with the channel color. Trends use Trace Up / Trace Down.
Don't hard-code source hex values in components. Reference them through the colors.channel-* tokens.
